title: SCRIPT CONSOLE
body: Sandbox for testing any Ignition scripting function before putting it in production. Type a function and see the result immediately.
code:
Tools → Script Console

# Read a tag
print system.tag.readBlocking(
  ["[default]Plant/TK101/Level"]
)[0].value

# Write a tag
system.tag.writeBlocking(
  ["[default]Plant/TK101/Level"], [42.5])

# Browse tags
for t in system.tag.browse("[default]Plant").getResults():
  print t["fullPath"]

# Query database
for row in system.db.runQuery(
  "SELECT * FROM tag_history LIMIT 5", "main_db"):
  print row
key: Output appears in the right panel
mistakes: Writing scripts in event handlers without testing
Confusing scope (gateway vs client vs session)
Forgetting print goes to the output panel
